# Bibliography Styles Reference

This document lists bibliography outputs for multiple styles using entries from `tests/fixtures/bib/sample.bib`.

## Numeric
1. Knuth DE. The TeXbook. Computers & Typesetting. 1984;A.
2. Lamport L. LaTeX: A Document Preparation System. 2nd ed. Addison-Wesley; 1994.
3. Miller A, Chen B. Efficient Graph Layouts for Large Diagrams. In: Proceedings of the Diagram Systems Conference; 2023. p. 101–115. doi:10.1234/diag.2023.15.
4. Garcia M. Multi-Script Typesetting for Scientific Publishing. PhD thesis. University of Example; 2022.
5. Lee D. Unicode Fonts for Complex Scripts. Technical Report ERL-2021-05. Example Research Lab; 2021.
6. Singh P. Accessible Math on the Web: A Practical Guide. 2024. Available from: https://example.com/accessible-math.

## Author-Year
Knuth, D. E. (1984). The TeXbook. Computers & Typesetting, A.
Lamport, L. (1994). LaTeX: A Document Preparation System (2nd ed.). Addison-Wesley.
Miller, A., & Chen, B. (2023). Efficient Graph Layouts for Large Diagrams. In Proceedings of the Diagram Systems Conference (pp. 101–115). doi:10.1234/diag.2023.15.
Garcia, M. (2022). Multi-Script Typesetting for Scientific Publishing (PhD thesis). University of Example.
Lee, D. (2021). Unicode Fonts for Complex Scripts (Technical Report ERL-2021-05). Example Research Lab.
Singh, P. (2024). Accessible Math on the Web: A Practical Guide. Retrieved from https://example.com/accessible-math

## Vancouver
1. Knuth DE. The TeXbook. Computers & Typesetting. 1984;A.
2. Lamport L. LaTeX: A Document Preparation System. 2nd ed. Addison-Wesley; 1994.
3. Miller A, Chen B. Efficient Graph Layouts for Large Diagrams. Proceedings of the Diagram Systems Conference. 2023:101–115. doi:10.1234/diag.2023.15.
4. Garcia M. Multi-Script Typesetting for Scientific Publishing. PhD thesis. University of Example; 2022.
5. Lee D. Unicode Fonts for Complex Scripts. Technical Report ERL-2021-05. Example Research Lab; 2021.
6. Singh P. Accessible Math on the Web: A Practical Guide. 2024. Available from: https://example.com/accessible-math.

## Superscript (numerical citations; bibliography same as numeric)
1. Knuth DE. The TeXbook. Computers & Typesetting. 1984;A.
2. Lamport L. LaTeX: A Document Preparation System. 2nd ed. Addison-Wesley; 1994.
3. Miller A, Chen B. Efficient Graph Layouts for Large Diagrams. In: Proceedings of the Diagram Systems Conference; 2023. p. 101–115. doi:10.1234/diag.2023.15.
4. Garcia M. Multi-Script Typesetting for Scientific Publishing. PhD thesis. University of Example; 2022.
5. Lee D. Unicode Fonts for Complex Scripts. Technical Report ERL-2021-05. Example Research Lab; 2021.
6. Singh P. Accessible Math on the Web: A Practical Guide. 2024. Available from: https://example.com/accessible-math.
